about: I'm Mario Balbi (known online as Balbus), a Computer Science graduate from the University of Salerno (Master's in Cybersecurity). I'm a pragmatic developer and creative problem solver with a focus on backend systems, cybersecurity, and AI/Data Science. My technical approach is rooted in reverse thinking — I like to understand how things work before deciding how to fix or improve them.
mission: Build automation tools that remove real friction from daily workflows. Apply AI and data science for practical, transparent utility — not black-box magic. Master backend engineering at scale and contribute to cybersecurity research. Craft software that is not just functional, but measurably efficient.
telos: P1: Unnecessary complexity slows systems down — performance should be a first-class concern, not an afterthought
P2: Automation potential goes unrealized — too much time is spent on repetitive tasks that computers should handle
P3: AI and ML remain inaccessible to most developers — the gap between research and practical tools is too wide
M1: Build tools that demonstrably save time and remove friction from developer and user workflows
M2: Apply Explainable AI to make data science results transparent, trustworthy, and production-ready
M3: Bridge backend engineering and AI/ML systems — from architecture to deployment
G1: Land a role at the intersection of backend engineering and AI/data science
G2: Build and maintain open-source tools that solve real problems for developers
G3: Achieve mastery of distributed systems, performance engineering, and AI integration at scale
